title: Janus Production Secret Rotation and Leak Scan
route: TEST SKILL SECURITY -> custom secret rotation/leak scanner -> SKILL 7

deploymentModel.rawSecretEvidencePolicy: Never write raw secret values; evidence stores key names, source classes, fingerprints and counts only.

compilerStatus.reason: Spec 13 requires secret-aware scanning and redacted evidence. A custom runner can inspect local secret sources, scan exact values without writing them, and validate runtime responses.

cases.expectedEvidence: Beta-facing secrets certified; source-map upload explicitly gated
Tracked and untracked non-ignored files contain no raw secret values or high-confidence credential patterns
frontend/dist and sourcemaps contain no raw secrets
Local AppData logs contain no raw secrets or credential patterns
Test artifacts contain no exact local raw secrets
Keyring/AppData/env storage model and PII-safe telemetry config verified
Dry-run runbook exists and requires no raw secrets in docs
